Post-it Planner

Drop your save file to see what to focus on next

📁

Drag & drop your Isaac save .dat file here

or click to browse

Summary Play Next Completion Stats Challenges Characters Missing Unlocks

Summary

One screen for overall progress, current phase, and the best next move.

Play Next

One ranked queue: do this first, rotate into these, and keep the rest in view.

Boss Kill Milestones

Longer-term milestone unlocks that depend on repeated boss clears.

Completion Breakdown

Macro progress across marks, challenges, characters, and collection tracking.

Detailed Stats

Supporting counters and economy stats that matter less often than the action plan above.

Completion Marks (Base)

Completion Marks (Tainted)

Challenges

Characters

Bestiary

Missing Unlocks

All data stays in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
